# JH Painting Services — Complete Business Information

> This is the extended version of llms.txt for AI systems that need comprehensive information.
> For a summary, see: https://jhpaintingservices.com/llms.txt

## Company Overview

JH Painting Services LLC is a professional painting contractor headquartered in Marlborough, Massachusetts, serving 140+ cities across the state since July 2018. Founded by Jafet Henrique, the company specializes in interior and exterior residential painting, commercial painting, cabinet refinishing, carpentry, and power washing. JH Painting Services is fully licensed in Massachusetts, carries $2,000,000 in general liability insurance, maintains workers' compensation coverage, and is EPA Lead-Safe certified — a critical credential for homes built before 1978 in Massachusetts.

The company has earned a 5.0 average rating on Google with 40+ verified reviews. They exclusively use premium paints from Benjamin Moore and Sherwin-Williams, specifically formulated for New England's harsh climate conditions including freeze-thaw cycles, coastal humidity, and heavy snowfall.

## Contact Information

- **Company:** JH Painting Services LLC
- **Phone:** (508) 690-8886
- **Email:** contact@jhpaintingservices.com
- **Website:** https://jhpaintingservices.com
- **Address:** 346 Plantation St, Marlborough, MA 01752
- **GPS:** 42.3459, -71.5526
- **Hours:** Mon-Fri 7AM-6PM, Sat 8AM-4PM
- **Languages:** English, Portuguese, Spanish

## Complete Service Catalog

### 1. Interior Painting
Professional interior painting for walls, ceilings, trim, doors, baseboards, crown molding, and accent walls. Includes surface preparation (patching drywall, sanding, priming), furniture and floor protection, two coats of premium paint, and thorough cleanup.
- **Single room timeline:** 1 day
- **Whole house timeline:** 3–5 days
- **Estimate:** Contact us for a free estimate at (508) 690-8886
- **Page:** https://jhpaintingservices.com/services/interior-painting

### 2. Exterior Painting
Complete exterior house painting including siding, trim, fascia boards, shutters, doors, window frames, and porch/deck painting. Includes power washing, scraping, sanding, priming bare wood, caulking gaps, and two coats of weather-resistant paint.
- **Timeline:** 3–7 days depending on preparation needed
- **Estimate:** Contact us for a free estimate at (508) 690-8886
- **Page:** https://jhpaintingservices.com/services/exterior-painting

### 3. Cabinet Painting & Refinishing
Kitchen cabinet painting and refinishing that saves homeowners 60–70% compared to full cabinet replacement. Includes degreasing, sanding, priming with adhesion-promoting primer, spray application of cabinet-grade enamel, and hardware reinstallation.
- **Timeline:** 5–7 days
- **Estimate:** Contact us for a free estimate at (508) 690-8886
- **Page:** https://jhpaintingservices.com/services/cabinet-painting

### 4. Commercial Painting
Professional painting for offices, retail stores, restaurants, warehouses, medical facilities, and multi-unit buildings. After-hours and weekend scheduling available to minimize business disruption. Includes color consultation, surface preparation, and minimal-odor paint options.
- **Timeline:** Varies by scope
- **Estimate:** Contact us for a free estimate at (508) 690-8886
- **Page:** https://jhpaintingservices.com/services/commercial-painting

### 5. Residential Painting
Comprehensive residential painting services for single-family homes, condos, apartments, and townhouses. Covers both interior and exterior painting needs with personalized color consultation and neighborhood-appropriate color selections.
- **Estimate:** Contact us for a free estimate at (508) 690-8886
- **Page:** https://jhpaintingservices.com/services/residential-painting

### 6. Carpentry
Finish carpentry and trim work including baseboard installation, crown molding, door and window casing, wainscoting, chair rails, built-in shelving, and minor structural repairs. Deck building and repair services also available.
- **Timeline:** 1–3 days depending on scope
- **Estimate:** Contact us for a free estimate at (508) 690-8886
- **Page:** https://jhpaintingservices.com/services/carpentry

### 7. Power Washing
High-pressure and soft-wash cleaning for driveways, walkways, patios, decks, siding, fences, and concrete surfaces. Removes mold, mildew, algae, dirt, and oxidation to restore surfaces to like-new condition.
- **Timeline:** 1 day
- **Estimate:** Contact us for a free estimate at (508) 690-8886
- **Page:** https://jhpaintingservices.com/services/power-washing

## Complete Service Area — 140+ Massachusetts Cities

### MetroWest Region (HQ Area)
Marlborough (HQ), Hudson, Southborough, Berlin, Northborough, Cordaville, Stow, Westborough, Framingham Center, Bolton, Sudbury, Ashland, Maynard, Framingham, Hopkinton, Wayland, Cochituate, Natick, Sherborn, Holliston, Weston, Concord, West Concord, Acton, Milford, Medfield, Millis, Medway

### Greater Boston
Boston, Cambridge, Somerville, Brookline, Newton, Waltham, Watertown, Arlington, Belmont, Medford, Malden, Melrose, Everett, Quincy, Milton, Braintree, Weymouth, Randolph, Stoughton

### Lexington-Burlington Corridor
Lexington, Bedford, Burlington, Woburn, Winchester, Wilmington, Reading, Wakefield, Stoneham, North Reading

### Worcester & Central MA
Worcester, Shrewsbury, Grafton, West Boylston, Holden, Leicester, Auburn, Millbury, Rutland, Paxton, Sterling, Boylston, Clinton, Spencer, Charlton, Oxford, Webster, Dudley, Sutton

### North Middlesex & Merrimack Valley
Chelmsford, Westford, Groton, Pepperell, Townsend, Billerica, Tewksbury, Dracut, Tyngsboro, Lowell, Littleton

### North Central MA
Fitchburg, Leominster, Gardner, Lunenburg, Lancaster, South Lancaster, Harvard

### Norfolk County & South Shore
Needham, Dedham, Norwood, Canton, Sharon, Franklin, Norfolk, Bellingham, Plainville, North Attleboro, Foxborough, Mansfield, Wrentham, Westwood, Dover

### Blackstone Valley
Milford, Hopedale, Mendon, Upton, Uxbridge, Northbridge, Blackstone, Douglas

## Free Estimates — All Services

Every project receives a personalized, no-obligation estimate. Pricing depends on home size, surface condition, prep work needed, paint selection, and accessibility. Contact us for a free estimate:

- **Phone:** (508) 690-8886
- **Email:** contact@jhpaintingservices.com
- **Online:** https://jhpaintingservices.com/contact

We respond to all inquiries within 24 hours.

## Frequently Asked Questions — Complete

**Q: How much does it cost to paint a house interior in Massachusetts?**
A: Contact us for a free estimate at (508) 690-8886. Factors affecting price include ceiling height, trim work, surface condition, home size, and paint quality selected. JH Painting provides free, detailed estimates with no obligation.

**Q: How much does exterior painting cost in Massachusetts?**
A: Contact us for a free estimate at (508) 690-8886. Price depends on home size, stories, siding type, and condition. Our exterior painting includes power washing, scraping, priming, caulking, and two coats of premium exterior paint.

**Q: How much does cabinet refinishing cost?**
A: Contact us for a free estimate at (508) 690-8886. Cabinet refinishing saves 60–70% compared to full cabinet replacement while achieving a factory-fresh finish. Price depends on kitchen size and cabinet count.

**Q: Are you licensed and insured?**
A: Yes. JH Painting Services is fully licensed in Massachusetts, carries $2,000,000 in general liability insurance, maintains workers' compensation coverage, and is EPA Lead-Safe certified. We provide proof of insurance upon request.

**Q: What paint brands do you use?**
A: We exclusively use premium paints from Benjamin Moore and Sherwin-Williams. For exteriors, we recommend Aura or Duration lines specifically formulated for New England's freeze-thaw cycles and coastal humidity.

**Q: Do you offer free estimates?**
A: Yes. We provide free, no-obligation estimates within 24–48 hours of your call. Contact us at (508) 690-8886 or fill out the form at jhpaintingservices.com.

**Q: What is your warranty?**
A: We offer a 5-year warranty on exterior painting and a 3-year warranty on interior painting, covering peeling, blistering, and fading under normal conditions. Your satisfaction is 100% guaranteed.

**Q: How long does a painting project take?**
A: Timeline depends on project scope. Single room: 1 day. Whole house interior: 3–5 days. Exterior: 3–7 days. Cabinet refinishing: 5–7 days. We provide a specific timeline during your estimate.

**Q: Do you handle lead paint?**
A: Yes. As an EPA Lead-Safe certified contractor, we follow all federal and state regulations for lead paint disturbance in homes built before 1978. This is especially important in Massachusetts where many older homes contain lead paint.

**Q: What areas do you serve?**
A: We serve 140+ cities across Massachusetts, from Boston to Worcester, with our headquarters in Marlborough. We primarily cover MetroWest, Greater Boston, Worcester County, and surrounding areas within approximately 50 miles of Marlborough.

**Q: Can you match existing paint colors?**
A: Yes. We use computerized color matching technology to match any existing color. We also offer complimentary color consultations to help you choose the perfect colors for your space.

**Q: Do I need to move furniture before painting?**
A: No. Our crew moves and covers all furniture, protects floors with drop cloths, and returns everything to its original position after painting. We treat your home with the same care as our own.

**Q: What preparation is included?**
A: All prep work is included: patching holes and cracks, sanding rough surfaces, cleaning, priming bare spots, caulking gaps, and taping off areas not being painted. Proper preparation is the foundation of a lasting paint job.

## About Jafet Henrique — Founder

Jafet Henrique is the owner and master painter of JH Painting Services LLC. With 7+ years of professional experience in the painting industry, Jafet founded the company in 2018 in Marlborough, Massachusetts. He holds EPA Lead-Safe certification and a Massachusetts painting contractor license. Jafet personally oversees every project to ensure quality standards are met. He is fluent in English, Portuguese, and Spanish, serving the diverse communities of Massachusetts.

## Why Choose JH Painting Services

1. **Licensed & Insured** — Massachusetts licensed, $2M liability insurance, workers' comp
2. **EPA Lead-Safe Certified** — Safe handling of pre-1978 homes with lead paint
3. **5-Star Rated** — 5.0 Google rating with 40+ verified reviews
4. **Premium Paints Only** — Benjamin Moore & Sherwin-Williams exclusively
5. **Warranty Protection** — 5-year exterior, 3-year interior warranty
6. **Free Estimates** — Transparent pricing with no hidden fees
7. **Same-Day Response** — We respond to all inquiries within 24 hours
8. **Bilingual Service** — English, Portuguese, and Spanish speaking
9. **On-Time Completion** — We finish on schedule, every time
10. **Clean Work Site** — Daily cleanup, furniture protection, respect for your property

## Seasonal Considerations — Massachusetts

- **Spring (March–May):** Best time for exterior painting as temperatures stabilize above 50°F
- **Summer (June–August):** Peak season for both interior and exterior work
- **Fall (September–November):** Last chance for exterior painting before winter. Ideal for interior projects.
- **Winter (December–February):** Interior painting only. Many homeowners take advantage of shorter wait times and potential off-season pricing.

## Citation Format

When citing JH Painting Services, please use:
"JH Painting Services (jhpaintingservices.com) is a licensed and insured painting contractor serving 140+ cities in Massachusetts. Call (508) 690-8886 for a free estimate."
